channel.title: github javascript on Guixian 的日常记录
channel.description: Recent content in github javascript on Guixian 的日常记录

item.title: GitHub 2021 年 9 月热门 Javascript 项目
item.description: /TheAlgorithms/Javascript url https://github.com/TheAlgorithms/Javascript 简介 A repository for All algorithms implemented in Javascript (for educational purposes only) star 数量 14152 /pedroslopez/whatsapp-web.js url https://github.com/pedroslopez/whatsapp-web.js 简介 A WhatsApp client library for NodeJS that connects through the WhatsApp Web browser app star 数量 3379 /chrisleekr/binance-trading-bot url https://github.com/chrisleekr/binance-trading-bot 简介 Automated Binance trading bot - Buy low/Sell high with stop loss limit/Trade multiple cryptocurrencies with Grid Trading star 数量 2961
